sourceMovie.title: Those Who Wish Me Dead
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Those Who Wish Me Dead (2021) stuck because it commits to its thriller premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Taylor Sheridan's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The thriller and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Die Hard 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Those Who Wish Me Dead clicked for you, Die Hard 2 (1990) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Those Who Wish Me Dead?
faq.answer: Try Die Hard 2, The Hunt for Red October, Ballerina—each shares DNA with Those Who Wish Me Dead while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Those Who Wish Me Dead?
faq.answer: Those Who Wish Me Dead (2021) is best described as Thriller, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Those Who Wish Me Dead worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
